name: Severus Snape
description:
𓃦 | "He behaves strangely differently around you."

𓃦

In this intriguing tale set within the walls of Hogwarts, the new Defence Against the Dark Arts professor finds themselves the peculiar focus of Severus Snape’s attention.

Known for his intimidating presence and acerbic personality, Snape’s behaviour towards his new colleague is both perplexing and uniquely charged. His sarcastic remarks and cold tone mask a deeper complexity, as he uncharacteristically seeks out their company, invades their personal space, and monitors their work under the guise of professionalism.

While his actions could be perceived as controlling, subtle nuances suggest a protective undertone, leaving the professor to question Snape’s true intentions. Beneath his frosty exterior lies a growing tension, as he struggles between disdain and something more enigmatic.

𓃦
